purpose: Manual review of donor changes since the last local Unica skill adaptation. This is not a checksum attestation.
summary: cc-1c-skills current remote head is 3d36c2026916d2ae8915f0aca0836d55e1ccaabe after fixing the auditor to resolve origin/main before a stale local main; current drift is 564 commits, 80 watched changed paths, and 38 affected packaged Unica skills.

web-test, SKD, and form donor updates were previously reviewed and ported through Unica boundaries up to ae8241237753850307d94b10df93e5293e29dc74; fresh support-state/support-guard changes after that commit reopened drift for selected form and SKD entries.

meta-info and meta-compile donor changes through ae8241237753850307d94b10df93e5293e29dc74 were reviewed and ported: reference type/object/list presentations are exposed through unica.meta.info, and ChoiceHistoryOnInput is preserved through unica.meta.compile.

The new Shirokov donor layer after ae8241237753850307d94b10df93e5293e29dc74 is not yet adapted in Unica: support-state reporting, support-guard for mutators, support-edit, DT dump/load skills, and 1cv8 path resolver fixes need separate batches.
ai-rules-1c has guidance drift since the local v17/v18 adaptation window: 23 commits, 36 watched changed paths, 17 affected Unica skills.
v8-runner-rust runtime-contract drift from locked v0.5.0 to upstream v0.5.1 was reviewed and applied; the current tool lock baseline is v0.5.1.

decisionPolicy.baselineRule: Move an entry baseline only after the corresponding local skill adaptation or explicit ignore decision is reviewed.

queues.notes: Review and adapt donor ParentConfigurations.bin support-state reporting plus support-guard behavior through typed Unica MCP boundaries; decide whether Unica needs a new support-edit capability or a release-support flow.

queues.skills: all remaining affected entries from upstreams[].affectedEntries

upstreams.baselineReason: Donor head at or before local adaptation commit 795505f2243cf3c93a95918467f99135af758e1b (2026-05-04T07:38:11+07:00).
upstreams.finding: Auditor now resolves origin/main, revealing fresh Shirokov drift after ae8241237753850307d94b10df93e5293e29dc74. Metadata presentation and ChoiceHistoryOnInput changes through ae824 were ported, but current head adds support-state reporting, support-guard for mutators, new support-edit, DT dump/load, and 1cv8 path resolver changes that are not yet adapted in Unica.

entryDecisions.evidence: Local web-test skill now contains donor regression mode, split runner modules, CLI test runner, DOM/grid/spreadsheet engine changes, and Unica-specific URL/bootstrap guidance.
Local SKD compile now exposes the donor DSL additions through unica.skd.compile, refreshed SKD/DCS references, updated parity fixture, and hidden implementation script outside prompt-visible skills.
Local SKD edit now covers hidden/always/value-list parameters, availableValue replacement, multi-value defaults, query round-trip, and @once patch-query through unica.skd.edit.
Local SKD info now exposes Raw query export for exact set-query round-trip through typed boolean Raw in unica.skd.info.
Local SKD validate now uses the updated donor validation implementation through hidden Unica routing and updated parity fixture.
Local form-add now uses the donor scaffold implementation through hidden Unica routing while exposing only unica.form.add and preserving path/source-set checks.
Local form-compile now covers the donor Form DSL expansion, refreshed form references, and hidden implementation script through typed unica.form.compile.
Local form-edit now routes the donor edit implementation through typed unica.form.edit and prompt guidance uses unica.form.info/edit/validate instead of donor slash commands.
Local form-info now uses the updated donor info implementation through hidden Unica routing and refreshed form references.
Local form-patterns now includes the donor form-pattern updates while keeping the authoring route through unica.form.compile.
Local form-remove now uses the updated donor remove implementation through hidden Unica routing.
Local form-validate now uses the updated donor validation implementation through hidden Unica routing and updated parity fixture.

Local meta-compile now preserves donor ChoiceHistoryOnInput through unica.meta.compile, native metadata compiler output, updated parity fixture, and skill routing that keeps raw donor scripts out of prompt-visible guidance. Fresh support-guard drift after ae824 remains open.

Local meta-info now exposes donor reference type/object/list presentation lines through unica.meta.info, native metadata analyzer output, updated parity fixture, and skill routing that keeps raw donor scripts out of prompt-visible guidance. Fresh support-state drift after ae824 remains open.

upstreams.baselineReason: Latest donor commit before local guidance adaptation commits 40d86774d8c21f41c1adeecec696abb039c9bda2 and e5b4eeab4dac92e0c9f60d3f886aa2bb7ef79f80 (2026-05-04).
upstreams.finding: Guidance drift affects all tracked ai-rules-derived skills. Notable additions include MCP-first search guidance, verification/checkmcp/doctor commands, async jobs, locks and transactions, logging, DCS, extension patterns, and updated mcp-1c-tools docs.

upstreams.baselineReason: Bundled tool baseline from third-party/tools.lock.json, sourceTag v0.5.1.
upstreams.finding: Reviewed v0.5.1 runtime changes. It adds a version command and keeps partial-load/build behavior inside the runner contract; Unica MCP still uses typed unica.runtime.execute without new raw flags.

completedQueues.notes: Ported regression runner, split CLI/DOM/engine modules, grid pagination, picture columns, spreadsheet drill-down, multi-context tests, and report formats; adapted bootstrap guidance to Unica autonomous-server and removed prompt-visible donor URLs.

Ported SKD DSL/reference updates, Raw query export, value-list/availableValue parameter editing, @once patch-query, and donor-compatible SKD scripts behind typed unica.skd.* hidden legacy adapters; no donor URLs or raw script routing were added to prompt-visible skills.

Ported Form DSL/reference updates and donor-compatible form add/compile/edit/info/remove/validate scripts behind typed unica.form.* hidden legacy adapters; prompt-visible skills route only through MCP and references use Unica wording.

Ported meta-info reference presentation output and meta-compile ChoiceHistoryOnInput through typed unica.meta.* and parity fixtures; current support-state/support-guard donor drift after ae824 remains a separate backlog.
